expectations.evidence: Skills and References Used: 'Workflow: workflows/sync-bmad-documents.md (Step 4: Field Mapping Setup)' and 'Reference: references/sync-mapping-guide.md'
Step 5: 'node .../scripts/sync.mjs setup-mapping --type story --sample DO-5' (DO-200 did not exist so DO-5 was used as substitute)

expectations.text: Presents the auto-detected field mapping to the user for review
expectations.evidence: Step 5 shows the raw output proposed mapping JSON and Step 6 is titled 'Review and Refine the Proposed Mapping'

expectations.text: Identifies standard fields (summary, description) and custom fields
expectations.evidence: Step 4 table shows standard fields (Summary, Description, Status, Priority, Labels) and custom fields (customfield_10020, customfield_10000, customfield_10019, etc.)

expectations.text: Custom fields are flagged with _needsReview for user to confirm
expectations.evidence: Step 5 mapping JSON shows custom fields with '"_needsReview": true' (e.g., customfield_10020 and customfield_10000)

expectations.text: Saves the confirmed mapping to memory/jira-story-field-mapping.json
expectations.evidence: Step 7: 'The mapping file should be saved to: .../skills/atlassian-rest/memory/jira-story-field-mapping.json'
